title: Cache hit rate per (channel, round)
description: D-56 per-round cache effectiveness — high hit rate means the SmartMonsterDriver is re-using an LLM decision within the same combat round, which is the design intent. Low hit rate near 0% would indicate the cache key is broken.
query_recipe: Phoenix UI → Project 'eldritch-cache' → Filter span_name='eldritch.monster.decision' → Compute (count where eldritch.driver.path='cache') / (total count) grouped by (eldritch.channel.id, eldritch.combat.round). Healthy: 30-60% hit rate during active combat rounds with multiple monsters.
